findings.evidence: `rg -n "ConditionallyIIDWith.map|ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi" code/TauCeti/Probability/Exchangeability/ConditionallyIID.lean` shows `ConditionallyIIDWith.map` at lines 114-119 has `@[grind =>]`, while `ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi` at line 147 has no automation attribute.
findings.fix: Add an appropriate `@[grind =>]` annotation to `ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi` so rectangle goals can be discharged from a `ConditionallyIIDWith` hypothesis without unfolding.
findings.issue: `ConditionallyIIDWith.blockLaw_univ_pi` is the rectangle-value eliminator for the new characterization, but it is not tagged for `grind`, unlike the existing defining eliminator `ConditionallyIIDWith.map`.

summary: The rectangle API is in scope, but its main eliminator is missing the automation annotation expected for characteristic API.
